race.comment: SAPLING (8) progressive filly who can stamp her authority here. Ridden aggressively when three weeks between runs with a tiring fourth over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Can overcome the sticky gate with the blinkers going on. SPIV (6) failed to back up his good Maiden win two-back, when raced too keenly as the ($1.40 fav) for a fading sixth over 1625m here last time. Back in trip with the 3kg claim and shapes as the main danger. ONMALONE (2) strengthened over the break with a tough victory over 1200m at this track. Looked to have plenty up the sleeve on that occasion and expected to go on with it this campaign. GONG GIRL (11) got the prize two runs back, then a month between runs with a tiring sixth over 1200m at Newcastle. Has the speed to get across from the wide gate and must be kept safe.
